channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: ASX declines amid mining sector weakness as Coles rises post-Greencross exit
item.description: Australian shares opened lower on Friday, pressured by miners and rising energy prices. The S&P/ASX 200 Index fell 0.3% to 8816.40, with materials and financials sectors leading the decline. Gold mine...

item.title: Wildfire Challenges and Evacuations in Boston Bar, B.C.
item.description: Wildfires near Boston Bar in British Columbia are facing heightened challenges due to erratic winds and the threat of dry lightning, according to the B.C. Wildfire Service. Environment Canada reports ...

item.title: Mugithi Singer Samidoh Celebrates DCP Victory in Ol Kalou By-Election
item.description: Mugithi singer Samidoh celebrated Democratic Change Party (DCP) candidate Kamau Waweru's win in the Ol Kalou by-election, sharing memes and political jabs against the ruling UDA party. His posts inclu...

item.title: Gabriela Moodaly-Salgado Aims for Wafcon Redemption After Overcoming Injury Challenges
item.description: Gabriela Moodaly-Salgado, a versatile South African footballer, is determined to redeem herself at the upcoming Wafcon tournament after enduring multiple career-threatening injuries that derailed her ...

item.title: Senate Passes Stricter Penalties for Road Safety Violations in Nigeria
item.description: The Nigerian Senate has passed the Federal Road Safety Corps (FRSC) Amendment Bill 2026, introducing stricter penalties for road traffic offenses. The bill proposes a ₦50,000 fine for preaching, hawki...

item.title: Anne Hathaway and Elliot Page's performances spark Oscar conversations at The Odyssey premiere
item.description: The article aggregates multiple celebrity news snippets, highlighting Anne Hathaway's surprise pregnancy announcement during a press tour for her film 'The Odyssey,' which has generated Oscar buzz. It...

item.title: NEET UG 2026 Results: 138 Candidates Scored 690+ Marks
item.description: The National Testing Agency (NTA) announced the NEET UG 2026 results, with 11.21 lakh candidates qualifying for undergraduate medical, dental, AYUSH, and allied courses. Nearly 20 lakh candidates appe...

item.title: PNP assures no security threats to BARMM elections during firearm ban
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) has assured that there are no security threats to the Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (BARMM) parliamentary elections despite the implementation of...

item.title: Defense Secretary's Testosterone Plan Faces Scientific Criticism
item.description: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has proposed annual testosterone screenings for troops aged 30 and older, with voluntary hormone therapy for those deemed deficient. The plan aims to restore a 'warri...

item.title: Fatal incident leaves 19-year-old dead, 5 youths injured in Cagayan
item.description: A tragic incident occurred in Cagayan where a 19-year-old individual lost their life following an attack, and five teenagers were injured. The event, which took place in Tuguegarao City, has sparked c...

item.title: Trump Uses 1990s Computer Game Photo to Support Election Meddling Claims
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump's recent speech on election security included a controversial reference to a 1990s computer game, 'Doom,' as part of a supposed evidence dump about election meddling. Accor...

item.title: iran and usa escalate military clashes in gulf region
item.description: iran has launched fresh attacks on u.s. facilities in the gulf following a sixth consecutive day of u.s. strikes on iranian military targets. the u.s. military stated it conducted airstrikes to degrad...

item.title: Senate Removes Deputy Minority Whip After Turbulent Meeting
item.description: The article details the chaotic removal of Nairobi Senator Edwin Sifuna from his position as Senate deputy minority whip following a heated parliamentary meeting. The event, marked by shouting, chaos,...

item.title: Trump Pushes for Election Security Measures Amid Midterm Elections
item.description: US President Donald Trump has reignited unfounded allegations of widespread voter fraud and Chinese interference in the electoral process, framing these claims as a critical warning ahead of the upcom...

item.title: Challenges in the Fight Against Corruption and Accountability Issues
item.description: The article discusses the ongoing challenges faced by the Investigative Directorate Against Corruption (IDAC), established by President Cyril Ramaphosa to combat corruption. It highlights the lack of ...

item.title: Scottie Scheffler Strong Start at British Open Amidst Competitive Field
item.description: US golfer Scottie Scheffler showcased his form with a solid opening round at the 154th Open Championship, sitting just one stroke off the clubhouse lead after his front nine at Royal Birkdale. The wor...

item.title: Assam woman deported to Bangladesh despite Gauhati High Court ordering fresh hearing on her citizenship case
item.description: An Assam woman, Mumtaz Begum, was allegedly deported to Bangladesh even though the Gauhati High Court had recently set aside an earlier Foreigners Tribunal order against her and directed a fresh exami...

item.title: Toronto FC and CF Montréal Draw 0-0 in MLS Match
item.description: Toronto FC and CF Montréal ended their MLS match in a 0-0 draw during the team's return from a break. The game, played at the stadium in Montreal, saw both teams struggle to break the deadlock despite...

item.title: PCSO partners with tech firm to expand lotto offerings
item.description: The Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) has entered into a partnership with ComWorks, a retail technology firm, to expand its lotto game availability and increase revenues for health and char...

item.title: Study highlights focal therapy as effective alternative to surgery for prostate cancer with fewer side effects
item.description: A major study led by Imperial College London suggests that focal therapy, a less invasive treatment for prostate cancer, is as effective as surgery or radiotherapy but with significantly fewer side ef...
